# Aethyx

> Premium, founder-led web design, brand identity, and digital experience studio based in Rhode Island, serving the entire United States. Aethyx builds custom websites, brand systems, and digital ecosystems for ambitious businesses — with a strong focus on SEO architecture, AI search visibility, and conversion-driven design.

Aethyx is led by Kristin Mitchell. Every engagement is handled directly by the founder, from strategy through launch. Pricing is custom and starts with a $50 paid consultation.

## Core Services
- Web Design & Custom Website Development
- Brand Identity & Visual Systems
- Digital Ecosystems (e-commerce, dashboards, booking, client portals)
- SEO Architecture & AI Search Optimization (GEO)
- Cinematic Brand Media & Competitive Intelligence
- Ongoing Platform Protection (premium maintenance)

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://aethyx.space/): Studio overview, services, and consultation entry point.
- [Services](https://aethyx.space/services): The four core service pillars and what's included.
- [Portfolio](https://aethyx.space/portfolio): Live projects including Rē Retreats, Kokopelli, and Vibe Shift.
- [About](https://aethyx.space/about): Studio philosophy, founder background, and approach.
- [Blog](https://aethyx.space/blog): Articles on web design, SEO, and small-business digital strategy.
- [Contact](https://aethyx.space/contact): Book a $50 consultation, request emergency support, or start a project.
- [Med Spa](https://aethyx.space/medspa): Vertical-specific landing page for medical spas and aesthetic clinics.
